pillars.name: Build
pillars.description: Plan, implement, validate, package, and release products.

pillars.name: Market
pillars.description: Position, publish, distribute, and grow products with explicit approval gates.

pillars.name: Learn
pillars.description: Collect product evidence, research, feedback, and experiments.

pillars.name: Visibility
pillars.description: Observe builds, runtime health, analytics, indexing, jobs, and outcomes.

pillars.name: Control
pillars.description: Coordinate the fleet, enforce policy, schedule work, and retain operator authority.
